message:
feat(conformance): add fsci-fft workspace dependency to conformance crate

Wire up the fsci-fft crate as a dependency of fsci-conformance so that FFT
conformance tests can import and validate the FFT implementation alongside
the existing linalg, integrate, optimize, signal, and special function suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
